Describe the visual changes regarding the wooden sculptures and surrounding people from the initial view to the presentation.
canonical_answer: At 4s, three painted wooden sculptures stand in the foreground near a crowd; at 6s, people walk around the totem poles near a visible 'SILVER' sign; at 12s, two men stand behind a blue table displaying the sculptures; at 14s, the man on the left holds a thin pointer while standing opposite the bearded man.

question: Describe the specific actions and overlays visible during the presentation behind the blue table.
canonical_answer: At 12s, a man with grey hair holds a thin white pointer near the sculptures; at 14s, text overlays appear identifying 'John Buxton' and 'ArtTrak.com' on screen; at 16s, the man in the suit gestures towards the layered materials on the blue table while the bearded man listens.
